ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: filling 72% [sugar, palm fat, skimmed milk powder, corn starch, flavourings, natural vanilla flavouring 0,1%, colour beta-apo-8'-carotenal (c 30)], wafer 28% (wheat flour, palm fat, emulsifier: soya lecithin, raising agent: sodium carbonates, salt), may contain peanut and nuts,
